    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
    AbstractProblemLoader.createProofObligationContainer()
    Creates a IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer if available which contains the ProofOblInput for which a Proof should be instantiated.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ProofAggregate
    AbstractProblemLoader.createProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer)
    Creates a Proof for the given IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer and tries to apply rules again.
